summary: Iteration 35 — Reply-with-template UX fixes (CTA preview styling, template-name label + bordered input, dropdown hint text, em-dash separator) and iteration_34 regressions (HUB URL, big PDF icon on /info, bullets removed). Verified directly in browser for 6/8 items; the 2 Reply-modal items inside the contact drawer were verified via static code review + the CSS-injection block computed in DOM on the EmailTemplates editor canvas (same CSS contract).

verified_items.evidence: Label 'TEMPLATE NAME — shown in the "Reply with template" dropdown' visible above input. Input computed CSS: backgroundColor=rgb(250,250,249) (stone-50), borderTopWidth=1px solid rgb(214,211,209) (stone-300), padding=8px 12px, fontSize=20px. NOT transparent — clearly a bordered field.
Screenshot shows large red PDF icon next to yellow 'DOWNLOAD THE INFO PACK' button. Filename caption beneath.

verified_items.item: Email Templates loads 2 templates incl. Franchise Enquiry Reply
verified_items.evidence: Templates list shows id 8ebca28f-d01b-49e0-a0d5-2926f1d7b38a (Franchise Enquiry Reply) and 59d55d09 (Licence Enquiry Reply (Overseas)). Category badges 'FRANCHISE' / 'LICENCE' visible.

Editor canvas shows yellow CTA button 'CLICK HERE TO DOWNLOAD THE CREATIVE MOJO LICENCE INFORMATION PACK' rendered with uppercase bold yellow #dddd16 background — same CSS contract as the Reply modal preview.

verified_items.item: REPLY MODAL PREVIEW CTA STYLING (code review)
verified_items.evidence: ReplyWithTemplateModal.jsx lines 239-277 inject a scoped <style> with selectors `a.cm-btn-cta`, `a[href^="{{file:"]`, `a[href^="{{landing:"]` setting background:#dddd16, color:#1a1a1a, text-decoration:none, text-transform:uppercase, font-weight:700, padding:11px 26px, display:inline-block, border-radius:4px. Outline variant covered at lines 263-276. Scoped to `.reply-preview-canvas` which is applied at line 225.

Lines 173-175: text 'Don\u2019t see your template? Open Email Templates and rename it — the name shown above is what differentiates options here.' contains <a href="/admin/email-templates" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">.
Line 169: option text is `${t.name}${t.category ? '   \u2014   ' + t.category : ''}` — em-dash with 3-space padding on both sides.

verified_items.item: TEMPLATES STATE CLEARED ON CLOSE (code review)
verified_items.evidence: Lines 31-40: useEffect on `open` returns early with setTemplates([]) when !open, then refetches /email-templates each time it reopens.
Line 232: DOMPurify.sanitize(..., { ADD_ATTR: ['target'] }) — preserves target=_blank on hint and CTA links.

blocked_items.item: Live Reply modal computed CSS assertion in browser
blocked_items.reason: After successful first browser run, subsequent automation sessions to /sales-contacts kept rendering blank (likely auth cookie / SPA hydration flake in headless re-runs); could not click contact card to open drawer 3 times in a row. Per loop-prevention rules I stopped after 3 attempts. Code path is identical to the EmailTemplates editor canvas (which IS rendering the yellow CTA correctly in the screenshot), so the regression is extremely low risk. Main agent can self-verify by opening the modal in their own browser.

critical_code_review_comments: Tiptap warning observed in console: "Duplicate extension names found: ['link', 'underline']" appears multiple times when navigating to /admin/email-templates. Non-blocking but should be cleaned up — likely double-registration of StarterKit + standalone Link/Underline extensions in RichTextEditor.jsx.

ReplyWithTemplateModal CSS for `a[href^="{{landing:"]` and `a[href^="{{file:"]` uses double-brace prefix — confirm template HTML actually stores `{{file:slug}}` rather than `{file:slug}` (it does, per EmailTemplatesPage.jsx line 201). Selector matches.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on items verified; 2 items code-reviewed only

context_for_next_testing_agent: Reply modal computed-style verification was blocked by SPA blank-page flake after the first browser run. To re-verify: log in fresh, go directly to /sales-contacts, click a contact card in the NEW column (e.g. 'Paul Caldeira-Dunkerley'), then the 'Reply with template' button in the drawer header. Select template id 8ebca28f-d01b-49e0-a0d5-2926f1d7b38a (Franchise Enquiry Reply). Inside [data-testid="reply-preview"], select `a.cm-btn-cta` and assert getComputedStyle().backgroundColor === 'rgb(221, 221, 22)' and textTransform === 'uppercase'.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found this iteration.
